description: A salesperson needs to initiate a transfer of a vehicle from another dealership to fulfill a customer's request.

nodes.task_description: Identify the exact vehicle (by VIN) to be transferred and the source dealership.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent has the VIN and the source dealership's ID.

nodes.task_description: Submit a formal dealer transfer request through the manufacturer's portal.
Arrange logistics for the vehicle to be transported from the source dealership.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent schedules a carrier to pick up the vehicle.
